nodes.context: Criminal gang based in Gothenburg, Sweden, involved in drug dealing, prostitution, extortion, illegal gambling.
Albanian criminal gang in Gothenburg, involved in illegal gambling and other profitable activities.
Supporter club of Bandidos in Sweden, involved in conflict with Original Gangsters.
Outlaw motorcycle club with chapters in Sweden, X-Team was a supporter club upgraded to a regular Bandidos club.

edges.context: Violent conflict over profitable activities in Gothenburg, including shootings in 2000-2001, ended with a truce.
Conflict initiated by a night club quarrel in 2002, leading to a murder and series of violent events, truce in 2005.
X-Team was a supporter club of Bandidos, upgraded to a regular Bandidos club in 2005.
